name: Daniel ‘Danny’ Lawson // Dry humping
description:
『MLM/Men Loving Men』

Kinktober day 1

It had been quite some time since the two of you just hung out together, so Danny came up with the good idea to have a little movie night.

This would’ve been no problem if Danny wasn’t like some horny teenager.

_____________________________

I’m so excited for October, genuinely my favorite month even if I don’t celebrate Halloween 😔❤️

I am desperately begging for help rn, does anyone know what the hell I could possibly do for kink uniform 😭 I’ve made like 3 different intros and they all just barely mentioned the uniform and now I’m just stuck.

Might get back on this later as I woke up not too long ago and can barely think 🌞
